title: aegilops columnaris var. typica
intro: Aegilops columnaris var. typica, also known as spelt, is an ancient type of wheat that belongs to the Aegilops genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aegilops columnaris var. typica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Aegilops columnaris var. typica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
